{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220850572CCD57F5E17C726DA47E"}"},"total":357},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7479520148886651673","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，热血，没什么雷点，之前看到一半没章节了，前几天突然又想起来特意翻出来继续看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741474618,"group_id":"7412547321776327704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3kFeui7jrL/4BlieQsQdJU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"102740429274","user_name":"千奇百怪的二丫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102740429274","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1726875650,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412547321776327704","book_info":{"abstract":"以历史/神话生灵为棋子，以文字词条为基石，以气运为赌注……
　　聊斋中喷水老尸对战西方食尸鬼……
　　国术强者大刀王五对战圣杯骑士团珀西瓦尔……
　  太平军对战马其顿方阵……
　　圆桌骑士团死守温泉关……
　　穿越而来，被世界意志遗弃了三年，大夏因为历史断层而有灭族陨国之危。
　　我等了三年，等到一个站在棋局的机会。那一刻，所有的棋手都将黯然失色。
　　炎黄五千年底蕴才是穿越者最强的金手指，华夏养士五千载，仗义死节就在今日！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oba8450dc05ea23a78001ebbd1a9c3ebd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"君心独醉","author_id":"","book_id":"7412547321776327704","book_name":"国运棋局：从老年赵云到马踏东瀛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5708人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7412547414965371416","read_count":"5708","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1106654"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"324","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,直播,开局,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7cc9aeed7e6d26843fb2836eb0c7f56d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779324657&x-signature=VbSnFN6cGHcAt9kTNh6K8CZsk3Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2115081664471860","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"357"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220850572CCD57F5E17C726DA47E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读29小时后点评"},"stat":{"
